title: Merging Branches Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git branch merge concepts.

questions.question: Regarding Git branching, which command is used to merge changes from one branch into another?
What is a 'Fast-Forward' merge in Git?
options: Merging directly without checking for conflicts
Moving the pointer to the latest commit if no new commits exist in the target branch
A merge commit that combinations two sets of changes

questions.question: Which type of merge is performed by Git when both branches have new commits since the branched off point?
